wafv2.rulegroup.orstatement.CfnAbout: A logical rule statement used to combine other rule statements with OR logic. You provide more than one [Statement](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-wafv2-webacl-notstatement.html

wafv2.rulegroup.orstatement.Statements.Description: The statements to combine with OR logic. You can use any statements that can be nested.
